title: The Potion of the Gemstone Reef
summary: Seeker and Dematar embark on a magical quest after discovering a mysterious diamond-shaped potion in a hidden closet. Upon drinking the sparkly blue liquid, they are transported to the Underwater Coral Reef Gemstone World. However, a sudden coral allergy forces a hasty retreat to the surface, where they discover two colorful tropical fish have been accidentally rescued in Seeker's beard. After outfitting the wizard in a new gemstone cloak, the duo provides their new pets, Muska Scaphor and Sinaphia, with a safe home and a feast of sparkly fish food.

highlightQuote.text: Let's name them Muska Scaphor, that's the red one's name, and Sinaphia for short for the blue one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right. Would you turn the lights out please?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: 5, 4, 3, 2, 1, lights out!
Star time. Seeker and Dematar.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Dema-tar.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And what kind of story do you want to tell? A chase adventure or a mystery adventure?
No, a potion adventure.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh! Well, once upon a time, Seeker was in his house and he had just woken up from his afternoon nap and he was stretching.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ding dong.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh ding dong, who is it? said Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It is Dematar.
Hello old friend Dematar. Come on in. Tell me how things have been for you lately, Dematar.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Um, it has been fishy amazing.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Fishy amazing? What do you mean by that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I mean everything tasted like fishies.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh well, if you like the taste of fishies then that must be great. I'm happy for you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well I'm interested in potions lately.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Potions? Well I happen to have quite a few of those in my potion closet. Should we try one right now, Dematar?
Of course we should.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Now there's a whole new set of potions that I just got and I don't even know what they do. But they're in these weird shaped bottles, come and look. This one is a tall skinny bottle, this one's triangular for some reason, and this one's a hexagon shape, and this one's shaped like a spiral... they're very weird bottles... this one's diamond shaped and...
I want the diamond shaped one.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, the diamond shaped one. And what color potion was inside the diamond shaped bottle?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know, sniff it Seeker, sniff it.
Oh, and Seeker popped the cork on the diamond shaped potion bottle and he gave it a sniff. Mmm, what is that smell? It's so familiar, I don't recognize it. Here, Dematar, give it a sniff.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Fishy! Fishy delicious!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It smells like fishy delicious? Very interesting. And the potion inside the diamond shaped bottle was light blue and it had little glittering sparkles inside. Hmm, well this is puzzling, said Seeker, a fishy diamond potion. I think there's only one thing for us to do. You know what it is?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Take a sip.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Don't drink the sparkles, be careful!
Oh, I won't drink the sparkles, said Seeker, don't worry. And he took a sip and so did Dematar and then Dematar said the rhyme.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Sparkle, sparkle, sparkle, sparkle, sparkle, sparkle.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Sparkle, sparkle, sparkle! And then there was a sparkle and a splash and a flash and they were in Underwater Coral Reef Gemstone World.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Who is living... who is living here?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, Dematar tried to say who is living here but it came out as bubble noises. And Seeker said we're underwater, swim up, swim up. And so they swam up towards the surface until they were floating on the surface of the water and Seeker said, my beard's all wet. Are you okay Dematar?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wait.
What's the matter?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Achoo, achoo!
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, gesundheit. Are you sneezing, Dematar? Are you just sneezing because you're cold or because you're allergic to something?
I think I'm allergic to the coral.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh my goodness, said Seeker, you're allergic to the coral. We better get you out of the water quick. And Seeker looked around and what did he see that could help them?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He saw some little rocks. Achoo, achoo, over the rocks.
And Dematar went achoo, achoo, pitter-patter over to the rocks. And then they climbed up on the rocks and Seeker pulled Dematar up with him and oof, they were out of the water.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And then they jumped off the water to the sand. Jump, jump, jump until they got to the sand and they try another one.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said, whoa, another one?
That doesn't make them allergic.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Well Dematar, first of all, I think you should blow your nose. Here's a tissue. And you know what else? My beard is soaked, my cloak is soaked. How about you, are you still wet Dematar?
Nope.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh that's good. You're just wearing your scales and those just drip dry right off, don't they? Well I gotta get changed, give me a minute.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Wait, I've got a purple cloak at home. Here Seeker. What do you think about that purple cloak? For now it has gems in the front and a snap in the back.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Wow, said Seeker, this purple cloak with gems is amazing. Can I borrow it?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Of course you can, you can wear it for now.
And he put his wet red cloak in the laundry basket and tried on the purple gemstone cloak and it fit just right. He said, wow, how do I look?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Great! You look like a wizard.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: I am one. And he twisted his beard and all the water squished right out and one or two little tiny fishies...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Fishies! Why did you come home?
Well they just must have swum into my beard when we were swimming in the ocean there.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Why were you swimming fishies while we were swimming? Dematar's allergic to the coral.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they said, help us, help us, we need water.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm sorry Dematar... we can't go in the water. Dematar's allergic to the coral.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: We just need a bowl of water or something.
Um, here's a fish tank. Put on a lid. Now you're in the water.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, swim, swim, swim. And the two little fishies were so happy. And what color were the little fishies?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: One was blue, one was red.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said, wow look at those beautiful little fish. They look like tropical fish. I wonder if they're hungry.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Fish food. Fish food.
Oh yeah... Dematar, do you have any fish food?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Okay. Here's a little bit of fish food, which is a little bit sparkly and it's all colored.

All colored, wow. And the two little fishies swam right up to the top and nibble nibble nibble, and then they swam around because they were so happy. And Seeker said, hey maybe we should name our little fishies.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Let's name them Muska Scaphor, that's the red one's name, and Sinaphia for short for the blue one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Muska Scaphor and Sinaphia?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, those are beautiful names. Well, Dematar, thanks for going on a little adventure with me. But I think it's time for me to have dinner. And that will be the end of Stars and Stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Shadow puppets! Shadow puppets! Sneaky llama. Birdy. This is a bird shape.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, that is a nice bird shadow you're doing. Flap, flap, flap.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Dimitar
characters.description: A sharp-witted resident of a circular island castle, this two-century-old purple dragonet carries a pirate’s salt-crusted legacy and a fierce devotion to his salvaged library. Formerly of the Cadasori galleries, Seeker’s grumpy companion now roams the deep to save his ancestral shores, though a recent volcanic disturbance has left him uncharacteristically sickened and frail. Driven by habit and a tireless appetite for fish, he bickers incessantly over snacks while guarding his remaining volumes with a brooding, protective intensity.

characters.name: Muska Scaphor
characters.description: A bright red tropical fish that was rescued from Seeker's beard after an underwater adventure.

characters.name: Sinaphia
characters.description: A blue tropical fish who, along with Muska Scaphor, was adopted as a pet by Seeker and Dematar.

places.name: Seeker's house
places.description: A home containing a specialized closet for various uniquely shaped magical potions.

places.name: Underwater Coral Reef Gemstone World
places.description: A vibrant submerged realm that Seeker and Dematar visit by using a diamond-shaped potion.

places.name: The Beach
places.description: The circular island is ringed by a brilliant, sparkling shore of lemon-yellow sand, providing a warm sanctuary for weary adventurers to dry off and recover from their journey through the depths.
